title: Token-opt: phase-boundary handoff digests — phase N+1 receives a schema-bound digest, never raw prior-phase transcripts/artifacts accumulation
summary: OpenAI-SDK nest_handoff_history pattern: orchestrator assembles a compact CYCLE HISTORY block from artifacts per phase edge instead of phases re-reading full prior reports; per-edge pruning of which artifacts flow (SafeSieve: -12 to -28 percent tokens, accuracy UP). GATED: defer until token-telemetry-s7 ships (measured baseline re-ranks these by actual top consumers). Research: knowledge-base/research/token-concurrency-2026/ (oss.md 13, papers.md 1.4/5.1).
acceptance: Each phase prompt embeds a bounded digest (size cap tested) instead of full prior artifacts
artifact flow per edge is explicit config, not give-everyone-everything
